name: notify-wecom
description: >- Send a single one-off message to a WeCom (Enterprise WeChat) group bot. Use this skill whenever the user says "/notify-wecom", "send a quick WeCom message", "企微通知一下", "临时发一条企业微信", or any one-shot notification that does not need a reusable template or setup workflow. The message is sent immediately; no confirmation prompt is shown unless the message is empty or the webhook is not configured.
author: daymade
